Updates

  • [Apr 2026] Reviewed for ACM UIST 2026, ACM CUI 2026, and ACM Creativity & Cognition 2026.
  • [Mar 2026] Joined the Program Committee for EDM 2026. Received Special Recognition for Outstanding Review at ACM DIS 2026. Also reviewed for ACM CHI PLAY 2026, ACM IDC 2026, and AMCIS 2026.
  • [Feb 2026] Reviewed for ACM CHI 2026 and ACM DIS 2026.
  • [Jan 2026] Reviewed for ECIS 2026.
  • [Nov 2025] Joined the Program Committee for ACM IUI 2026.
  • [Sep 2025] Reviewed for OzCHI 2025.
  • [Aug 2025] Started my PhD in Computer Science at UC Irvine, advised by Prof. Habiba Farrukh!
  • [May 2025] Graduated with a B.Sc. in Computer Engineering from Sharif University of Technology.
  • [Apr 2025] Joined the SPECT Lab at UC Irvine as a Research Assistant.
  • [Mar 2025] Reviewed for ACM Creativity & Cognition 2025.
  • [Feb 2025] Reviewed for ACM IMX 2025.
  • [Nov 2024] Served as reviewer for ACM IUI 2025 and ACM TEI 2025.
  • [Oct 2024] Served as reviewer for ACM CHI 2025.
  • [Aug 2024] Student Volunteer at ACM CSCW 2024 and ACM ISS 2024.
  • [Apr 2024] Reviewed for ACM IDC 2024.
  • [Mar 2024] Reviewed for ACM DIS 2024.
  • [February 2024] Two Late-Breaking Work papers and a Workshop paper accepted at ACM CHI 2024!
  • [January 2024] Our paper on decentralized collaborative peer assessment was accepted at ACM CSCW 2024.
  • [Nov 2023] Reviewed for ACM CHI 2024 Case Studies.
  • [Sep 2022] Won a Bronze Medal at the International Blockchain Olympiad (IBCOL) and Gold at the National level.

© 2026 Iman Mohammadi
